gate: verification-before-completion: NO COMPLETION CLAIMS WITHOUT FRESH VERIFICATION EVIDENCE
why_rerun: code_review applied two fixes (return-original-charge assertion; crashed-owner timeout). The earlier green from implement_tdd is now STALE; re-verify fresh.

steps.what_proves_it: full pytest suite (no regressions) + the concurrency regression test + a red-green revert check

steps.procedure: git stash the source fix in idempotency.py/charge_handler.py -> run regression test -> MUST FAIL -> restore -> run -> MUST PASS
steps.reverted_run: FAILED test_concurrent_same_key_charges_once: expected 1 charge, got 6  (proves the test actually catches the bug)

requirements_checklist.evidence: 50 concurrent same-key -> exactly 1 PSP charge; load probe 0% duplicates at concurrency 8 & 16

requirements_checklist.requirement: retried request returns the ORIGINAL charge
requirements_checklist.evidence: all 50 responses carry the identical charge id (the owner's)

requirements_checklist.requirement: holds under concurrency, not just happy path
requirements_checklist.evidence: regression test is concurrent by construction; red-green revert proves it

requirements_checklist.requirement: crashed owner does not hang the retry
requirements_checklist.evidence: bounded-deadline test passes; stale in_progress reclaimable

claim: Verified: bug fixed, zero regressions, all requirements met - stated WITH fresh evidence, not assertion.
source: verification-before-completion Gate Function + 'Regression tests (TDD Red-Green)' revert pattern
